General.Name: Kps AG
General.Description: KPS AG provides business transformation consulting and process optimization services for the retail and consumer goods sectors in Germany, Scandinavia, the United Kingdom, Switzerland, Benelux, Spain, and internationally. It operates in three segments: Management Consulting/Transformation Consulting, System Integration, and Products/Licenses. The company offers advisory services on strategic, process, application, and technology issues relating to digital transformation. It also sells software licenses, maintenance contracts, and hardware components as a certified system house and sales partner. In addition, the company offers enterprise resource planning solutions (ERP) comprising SAP S/4HANA transformation, SAP cloud ERP implementation, and KPS Instant Platform, as well as AI, data, and analytics; finance transformation solutions consisting of CFO agenda, invoice management, smart retail analytics, enterprise information management, and SAP Concur; customer experience solutions, including commerce, marketing automation, content management, loyalty, and service management; supply chain and logistics solutions, such as supply chain strategy and supply chain network design; and strategy and innovation solutions, which include business strategy and innovation, process strategy and innovation, and strategic management consulting services. Further, it provides project and transformation management; IT operations and application management; and technology consulting and architecture services. The company serves B2B and B2C companies. The company was formerly known as Haitec AG and changed its name to KPS AG in May 2008. KPS AG was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Unterföhring, Germany.
